error_signature: public url not working from GetPublicUrl method
title: Supabase GetPublicUrl method returns incorrect URL
symptom: Using the GetPublicUrl method in WeWeb returns a URL from 'render/image' instead of 'object/public', resulting in a non-functional link.
applies_when: Using Supabase bucket for image storage
Trying to retrieve public URL using GetPublicUrl method
not_this_if: Directly accessing the URL from Supabase dashboard works
Using a different method like GetSignedURL
root_cause: The GetPublicUrl method in WeWeb is incorrectly configured to point to the 'render/image' directory instead of the correct 'object/public' directory, leading to invalid URLs for accessing stored images.
fix_steps: Implement custom JavaScript to call the Supabase plugin
Use the provided code snippet to retrieve the correct public URL
Test the returned URL to ensure it works as expected
agent_instruction: Use custom JavaScript to call the Supabase plugin for retrieving the correct public URL.
